Uses of Class
neqsim.process.safety.scenario.ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator

Packages that use ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator
Package
Description
neqsim.process.safety.scenario
Automatic scenario generation for safety analysis.

  • Uses of ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator in neqsim.process.safety.scenario

    Methods in neqsim.process.safety.scenario that return ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.addWeatherCase(String name, BoundaryConditions conditions)
    Adds a named weather case to the batch weather envelope.
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.backPressure(double backPressureBara)
    Sets the downstream back pressure for the leak model.
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.boundaryConditions(BoundaryConditions boundaryConditions)
    Sets the boundary conditions for generated dispersion calculations.
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.consequenceBranches(List<ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.ConsequenceBranch> branches)
    Sets consequence branches for ignition and non-ignition outcomes.
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.fullBoreDiameter(double diameter, String unit)
    Sets the full-bore rupture diameter used by the taxonomy.
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.holeDiameter(double holeDiameterM)
    Sets the representative leak hole diameter.
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.holeDiameter(double holeDiameter, String unit)
    Sets the representative leak hole diameter with unit conversion.
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.inventoryVolume(double inventoryVolumeM3)
    Sets the representative isolated inventory volume used by the source-term model.
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.minimumMassFlowRate(double minimumMassFlowRateKgPerS)
    Sets the minimum stream mass flow required before a stream is screened.
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.minimumPressure(double minimumPressureBara)
    Sets the minimum stream pressure required before a stream is screened.
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.modelSelection(GasDispersionAnalyzer.ModelSelection modelSelection)
    Sets the dispersion model selection strategy.
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.releaseCases(ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.ReleaseCase... releaseCases)
    Sets explicit release cases for scenario matrix generation.
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.releaseDuration(double releaseDurationSeconds, double timeStepSeconds)
    Sets release duration and time step for generated source terms.
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.releaseHeight(double releaseHeightM)
    Sets the effective release height used in dispersion screening.
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.releaseOrientation(ReleaseOrientation releaseOrientation)
    Sets release orientation for generated source terms.
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.toxicEndpoint(String componentName, double thresholdPpm)
    Adds a toxic endpoint calculation to every generated dispersion scenario.
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.trappedInventory(TrappedInventoryCalculator inventoryCalculator)
    Calculates and uses an evidence-linked trapped inventory result.
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.trappedInventory(TrappedInventoryCalculator.InventoryResult inventoryResult)
    Uses an evidence-linked trapped inventory result as the isolated source volume.
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.useDefaultConsequenceBranches()
    Restores the built-in consequence branch set.
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.useDefaultScenarioTaxonomy()
    Enables the built-in release taxonomy for industrial screening matrices.
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.useDefaultWeatherEnvelope()
    Enables a default industrial weather envelope.
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator
    ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.weatherCases(List<ReleaseDispersionScenarioGenerator.WeatherCase> weatherCases)
    Replaces the batch weather envelope with explicit weather cases.
